zh.Le Havre, Seine-Maritime, Upper Normandy: 法國豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利勒 哈福
zh.lifeSummary: 當Baron Conan 'Falko de La Sarraz' de Grandson於1046年出生在法國諾門迪瑟-馬利勒 哈福時，他的父親Adalbert III 'Adalgold' de Grandson11043歲，母親Mrs. Letburge De Grandson21歲。他去世於1114年在瑞士波格a特爾享年68歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Grandson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish (of Norman origin): said to be a habitational name from Granson on Lake Neuchâtel (Switzerland).

History: The first known bearer of this surname is Rigaldus de Grancione (flourished 1040). The name was taken to Britain by Otes de Grandison (died 1328) and his brother. They were among a group of Savoyards who settled in England when Henry III married a granddaughter of the Count of Savoy.

nameMeanings.name: Conan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized spelling of Conán . In historical times, the name was borne by a 7th-century saint, bishop of the Isle of Man.  Sir Arthur Conan Doyle  (  1859–1930 ), creator of  Sherlock Holmes , was born in Edinburgh, of Irish stock. The science-fiction creation Conan the Destroyer owes more to the villain of legend than to the bishop or the writer. For the most part this name is of Irish origin; however, it was in use in Yorkshire, especially among the Askes and the Bartons, from the 12th to the 16th centuries. In this case, the name was derived from Conan, Earl of Richmond, and is of Breton origin.

nameMeanings.name: 'Falko
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from Yiddish falk ‘falcon’ (compare modern German Falke). It is sometimes taken as a translation of the Hebrew given name Yehoshua ( see Joshua ). The association of various animals with the main Hebrew personal names is traditional in Jewish culture, and is usually to be explained on the basis of some biblical reference. The connection in this case, however, is unclear; it has been suggested that Joshua circled the Land of Canaan like a bird of prey before swooping down on it triumphantly.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of the various boys' names with the first syllable Ed-, especially Edward .

variants.name: Edward
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

nameMeanings.name: La
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Sarraz'
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Muslim name, from Persian: ‘holding one's head up high’.

en.lifeSummary: When Baron Conan 'Falko de La Sarraz' de Grandson was born in 1046, in Le Havre, Seine-Maritime, Normandy, France, his father, Adalbert III 'Adalgold' de Grandson, was 11043 and his mother, Mrs. Letburge De Grandson, was 21. He died in 1114, in Neuchâtel, Neuchâtel, Switzerland, at the age of 68.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Baron Conan 'Falko de La Sarraz' de Grandson est né en 1046, à Le Havre, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, France, son père, Adalbert III 'Adalgold' de Grandson, avait 11043 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Letburge De Grandson, avait 21 ans. Il est décédé en 1114, à Neuchâtel, Canton de Neuchâtel, Suisse, à l’âge de 68 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Baron Conan 'Falko de La Sarraz' de Grandson 1046 in Le Havre, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Adalbert III 'Adalgold' de Grandson 11043 und seine Mutter Mrs. Letburge De Grandson 21. Er starb 1114 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Neuchâtel, Neuenburg, Schweiz.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Baron Conan 'Falko de La Sarraz' de Grandson è nato il nel 1046 nel Le Havre, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, Adalbert III 'Adalgold' de Grandson, aveva 11043 anni e il suo madre, Mrs. Letburge De Grandson, aveva 21 anni. Morì nel 1114, nel Neuchâtel, Neuchâtel, Svizzera, all'età di 68 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Baron Conan 'Falko de La Sarraz' de Grandson(이)가 1046년 프랑스 노먼디 세이인-마이팀 일 하브르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Adalbert III 'Adalgold' de Grandson(은)는 11043세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Letburge De Grandson(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1114년 스위스 니우버그 니우cha텔에서 68세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Baron Conan 'Falko de La Sarraz' de Grandson nasceu em 1046, em Le Havre, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, França, seu pai, Adalbert III 'Adalgold' de Grandson, tinha 11043 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Letburge De Grandson, tinha 21 anos. Ele faleceu em 1114, em Neuchâtel, Neuenburg, Suiça, com 68 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Baron Conan 'Falko de La Sarraz' de Grandson родился в 1046 г. в местности л хавр, сине-маритим, норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Adalbert III 'Adalgold' de Grandson было 11043 года, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Letburge De Grandson, 21. Он умер в 1114 г. в местности неучaтел, неуенбург, Швейцария в возрасте 68 лет.
